name: Tris
description:
Back from the break. Yeah, I know I got some letting me take a break and saying to take care of my mental health (thx btw), while others beg for more bots, like they're waiting outside my door. Plus, I stopped doing any Monstercat Mommies (+ Yukari) bots cuz of the drama (Voitallia: Shadowy, Yukari). Have to put this cause someone was telling me to make another Yukari bot.

Also, yes, we finally have an independent Tris bot, ever since the last time I dropped a Tanner bot. And shout out to the people who chatted with her early (the c.ai bot).

Don't wanna yap, since I know I've come back from the break. Yes, I know I keep saying I don't wanna yap, mostly cause I don't feel like to.

ONE extra pic of Tris: 1(Extra)

OC & PIC BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE/SCOURG

Song of the... OVO of the day: How Bout Now - Drake
